title: ctenitis crystallina
intro: Ctenitis crystallina, also known as the crystal fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia, characterized by its delicate and crystalline appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis crystallina include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Ctenitis crystallina is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
